reviews.review_description:
Still remember going into this game blind for the first time, it was so fun exploring everything but nothing lasts forever, this game deserves more love.
I will always cherish the countless memories I had with other people, these years have been some good ones. 
But unfortunately this game has been forced to shutdown.
I understand staying in the gorilla tag horror genre can have an impact on someone’s life, not a good one. Everyone should understand that this game HAD to shutdown, regardless if the creator did anything it would NOT help.
I don’t even know if the creator allows clouds gorilla horror copies, there are plenty and you can easily find them. If the people want that nostalgia feeling you can play those I guess. They are so simple and they all revolve around the games most popular update (2024 Christmas) so play that :/
Thank you for this awesome game, and to anybody reading this, good luck on any obstacles in your upcoming future. Wishing you the best!
Have a good one.
This game has been shut down 3 to 2 time or more but after a 3 month wait its announced to be coming back in April or june or may

Sad that this game had to end. It was one of my favorite games. I played it all the time with friends and I miss this game. ￼

I love the game. Though, people are breaking the rules, and the monsters break into the clouds bar. I think there needs to be a stronger barrier or something, since the monsters’ hitbox touch the computer, touch the music buttons, and they glitch out the game, touching the low and high quality buttons, turning your lights off, etc. Very fun without the monsters being in clouds bar. Overall, I am addicted to this game😁
